creator: marc.cabanatuan@gmail.com
text:
Using 'pkg install elasticsearch6' I receive an error/failure on the extraction step. I previously had elasticsearch2-2.4.6 installed.

[1/1] Extracting elasticsearch6-6.2.4: 100%
pkg: Fail to rename /usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/.config.X2FZvCVe6g50 -> /usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/config:Is a directory


marcc@netmon3-wa:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch % ls -lah
total 60
drwxr-xr-x   7 root  wheel   512B Jul 12 09:15 .
drwxr-xr-x  47 root  wheel    28K Jul 11 14:35 ..
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    23B Jul  4 09:11 .config.X2FZvCVe6g50 -> ../../etc/elasticsearch

I've ensured that my pkg repository and catalog is up to date.
